info.name: SMKK Global Module
info.description: API collection for SMKK Global (SMKK Percentage) module - Management of SMKK (Standar Mutu Konstruksi dan Keamanan) percentage values by month and year

item.name: Query Endpoints

request.description:
Get all SMKK Global with optional pagination.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "SmkkGlobal list retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "bulan": 1,
        "tahun": 2024,
        "persentase_smkk": 15.5,
        "createdAt": "...",
        "updatedAt": "..."
      }
    ],
    "page": 1,
    "amount": 10,
    "total": 12,
    "totalPages": 2
  }
}
```

Get single SMKK Global by ID.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "SmkkGlobal retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "bulan": 1,
    "tahun": 2024,
    "persentase_smkk": 15.5,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

item.description: Read endpoints accessible by ADMIN and SUPERADMIN

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (ADMIN, SUPERADMIN)

request.description:
Create new SMKK Global entry.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Body**:
```json
{
  "bulan": number,           // Required - Month (1-12)
  "tahun": number,           // Required - Year (>=2000)
  "persentase_smkk": number  // Required - SMKK percentage (0-100)
}
```

**SMKK (Standar Mutu Konstruksi dan Keamanan)**
- Standard percentage for construction quality and safety
- Typically ranges from 10% to 20%
- Used in road construction cost calculations

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "SmkkGlobal created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "bulan": 1,
    "tahun": 2024,
    "persentase_smkk": 15.5,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Update existing SMKK Global.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,              // Required - ID to update
  "bulan": number,          // Optional - Month (1-12)
  "tahun": number,          // Optional - Year (>=2000)
  "persentase_smkk": number // Optional - SMKK percentage (0-100)
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "SmkkGlobal updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "bulan": 1,
    "tahun": 2024,
    "persentase_smkk": 16.0,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Delete SMKK Global by ID.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "SmkkGlobal deleted successfully"
}
```

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Accessible by ADMIN and SUPERADMIN
